name: Aussie Ham and Pasta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta in boiling water until tender, then drain and rinse.
2. Cut ham into thin strips. Cut zucchini into thin strips or grate. Cut artichoke hearts into quarters.
3. Assemble salad in a medium bowl, gently mixing all ingredients together.
4. Combine dressing ingredients in a covered container, shaking well. Pour dressing over salad.
